currencyMigrationFeatureDisabled: Currency migration is disabled in this deployment. Contact your operator to enable it.

currencyMigrationRestoreInProgress: A restore operation is currently running on this group; try again after it finishes.

global.server: Server error. Please try again later.

lockedDuringMigration: Locked while a currency migration is running.

maintenance.description: The system is temporarily unavailable while we perform scheduled maintenance. This usually takes less than 30 minutes.
maintenance.heading: We'll be right back

notFound.description: The page you requested doesn’t exist or has been moved.

unexpected.heading: Something went wrong
